name: External Link Warning
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Warns before opening external links to unknown domains. Admins can pre-populate a trusted domain list.

trustedDomains.label: Trusted domains (organisation-wide)
trustedDomains.description: Comma- or newline-separated list of trusted domains. Applies to every user. Subdomains match automatically (example.com also trusts docs.example.com).

trustedDomainsCsv.label: Trusted domains
trustedDomainsCsv.description: Comma- or newline-separated list of trusted domains (e.g. example.com, github.com). Subdomains are matched automatically.

warnOnSameDomainEmail.label: Warn even when sender domain matches
warnOnSameDomainEmail.description: If enabled, warn even when the link domain matches the sender's email domain.

rememberLocalChoices.label: Allow “Always trust” checkbox
rememberLocalChoices.description: When enabled, the warning dialog includes a checkbox that permanently trusts the domain on this device.
